summary: Completed testing of LLM-powered narrative analysis feature. Backend: 8/8 tests passed - trustlens_perspective is now AI-generated via Claude Sonnet 4.5. Suspicion Score and Pattern Statistics remain deterministic. Frontend: ResultsDashboard correctly displays AI-generated narrative in TrustLens Perspective card.
passed_tests: Backend: API health check - /api/ returns status=active
Backend: Results endpoint returns trustlens_perspective field with >20 chars content
Backend: Narrative is NOT one of the 4 hardcoded fallback templates
Backend: Narrative uses measured language - never states certainty about infidelity
Backend: Suspicion score is deterministic - same inputs produce identical scores
Backend: Pattern statistics are deterministic - computed from case database
Backend: Narrative references actual session data (signals, score, patterns)
Backend: Results endpoint completes within 15 seconds (LLM call ~5-7s)
Frontend: Landing page loads correctly with Start Analysis button
Frontend: Analysis flow accessible (Clarity → Deep Analysis → Baseline → Changes → Timeline → Investigation)
Frontend: ResultsDashboard.jsx displays results.trustlens_perspective in TrustLens Perspective card (line 687)
critical_code_review_comments: generate_narrative_analysis() in server.py (lines 954-1003) correctly implements LLM call with unique session_id to avoid caching
LLM prompt includes all required context: suspicion score, signals, pattern stats, timeline data, case insights
Fallback to template via generate_perspective_fallback() if LLM fails - ensures graceful degradation
Suspicion score calculation in calculate_suspicion_score() is fully deterministic (no AI involvement)
Pattern statistics come from MongoDB case database comparison - also deterministic
seed_data_creation: Used existing 300+ relationship cases seeded on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: LLM narrative analysis via Claude Sonnet 4.5 is fully working. The trustlens_perspective field in GET /api/analysis/{id}/results is now AI-generated, contextual, and references actual session data. Suspicion Score and Pattern Statistics remain deterministic. Fallback templates exist in generate_perspective_fallback() if LLM fails. Results endpoint takes ~5-7 seconds due to LLM call. Previous iteration (7) covered structural upgrades including suspicion score calibration, PDF export, and case contribution features.
verified_features: trustlens_perspective is NOT hardcoded - AI generates unique contextual narratives
Narrative references session-specific data (signals like phone_secrecy, emotional_distance)
Narrative uses measured language (may suggest, patterns indicate, could reflect)
Narrative never states certainty about infidelity
Suspicion score remains deterministic (same inputs = same score 77 in tests)
Pattern statistics remain deterministic (from MongoDB case database)
